headline: Here’s What JPMorgan Thinks About Microsoft (MSFT) and Chevron’s 20-Year Agreement
summary: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is one of the best trending AI stocks to watch in 2026. headline: EU Targets Microsoft (MSFT) and Amazon Cloud Units for Big Tech “Gatekeeper” Rules, Reuters Reports
summary: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is one of the safe stocks for beginners to buy in 2026. Reuters reported on June 25 that, according to EU antitrust regulators, Amazon and Microsoft Corporation’s (NASDAQ:MSFT) cloud computing services should be designated as “gatekeepers” under landmark tech rules. This step would subject them to strict obligations aimed at curbing market […]

headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Joins Russell Top 50 As AI Power Backlog Draws Investor Focus
summary: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) has been added to the Russell Top 50 Index, reflecting its inclusion among some of the largest U.S. companies by market value. The move comes as Caterpillar reports a record order backlog tied to AI data center power generation projects. The company supplies engines and turbines for large scale infrastructure efforts, including the Chevron Microsoft power initiative for AI data centers. Caterpillar sits at an intersection of heavy equipment manufacturing and large...

headline: Microsoft vs. Alphabet: What Their Revenue Trends Tell Investors
summary: Alphabet has outpaced Microsoft in top-line revenue for every recent quarter, but both tech giants continue to report steady long-term growth.
